description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker featuring a dynamic color palette of blue, black, and tan. The upper is primarily constructed from blue mesh and synthetic materials, with black overlays and a tan midsole that wraps around the base. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue for comfort, and white laces threaded through reinforced eyelets in a standard criss-cross pattern. The midsole is thick and sculpted, likely made from EVA foam, providing cushioning and support, while the outsole appears to be made of durable rubber. The overall design is sporty and robust, suitable for urban environments and casual wear.
description: A blue, black, and tan athletic sneaker with a thick sculpted sole, mesh upper, and white criss-cross laces. The design is sporty and modern, ideal for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue mesh upper, black overlays, and tan sculpted midsole with visible texturing.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white criss-cross laces, padded tongue, and toe box with blue and black panels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same color scheme and sculpted tan midsole, with black detailing near the heel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the padded blue heel collar, heel counter, and the wraparound tan midsole.
